content: Remote trunk verification is green after the recent merges: I fetched `origin/run/facebook/main`, ran the archived `tests.js` plus `clipboard.test.js`, and both passed. Your edit-commit fix is part of the final integrated artifact.

I rebased `run/facebook/Henry-lazy-if` onto the latest `run/facebook/main`, resolved the `engine.js` and `tests.js` conflicts by keeping the fuller lazy-`IF` short-circuit logic and coverage, reran `node tests.js`, and force-pushed the updated branch. Please re-check and merge PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/247 once GitHub refreshes its mergeability. Author: Henry
